presetManager.presetInfo: Preset will be identified by current text content

saveButton.formatInfo: Image will be saved in JPG format with compression

welcome.title: Welcome to Image Generator
welcome.description: This is a simple yet powerful online image generation tool. Let's learn how to use it together.

size.title: Set Image Size
size.description: Adjust the width and height of the image here, in pixels.

text.title: Add Text Content
text.description: Enter the text you want to display on the image in the text box.

color.title: Customize Colors
color.description: Choose background color, text color, or use gradient effects.

preset.title: Save Preset
preset.description: Save current settings as a preset for quick use later.

save.title: Save Image
save.description: After completing settings, click here to save the image to your local device.
